title: ICAI Invites EOI for Empanelment of Resource Persons/Faculty/Experts for Board of Studies
content:
# ICAI Invites EOI for Empanelment of Resource Persons/Faculty/Experts for Board of Studies

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne apne Board of Studies ke liye Resource Persons, Faculty, aur Experts ke empanelment ke liye Expression of Interest (EOI) announce kiya hai.

This is a significant move to strengthen the academic and training initiatives of the ICAI.

*   **What:** The ICAI has issued an invitation for an Expression of Interest (EOI) for the empanelment of individuals to serve as Resource Persons, Faculty, and Experts.
*   **Why:** This initiative aims to expand the pool of qualified professionals who can contribute their expertise to the various programs and activities of the Board of Studies.
*   **For Whom:** Chartered Accountants and other professionals with relevant experience are encouraged to apply, to become part of the esteemed faculty and expert panel of ICAI's Board of Studies.
*   **Published On:** This official announcement was published on June 4, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/)

*Published on: 4 June 2026*
